title: NanoRibolyzer
description: Repository for a nanopore sequencing based ribosomal RNA analysis pipeline

input.title: Input Options
input.description: Parameters for finding and handling input data for NanoRibolyzer.

sample_folder.title: Pod5 folder
sample_folder.description: Path to folder containing pod5 files

color.title: Colorscheme
color.description: Select a color for the html report and the plots

model_organism.title: Define the model organism of the experiment
model_organism.description: Human or Yeast are available for now.
model_organism.help_text: Human (Homo sapiens) and Yeast (Saccharomyces cerevisiae) are currently integrated model organisms. We are working on the integration of further organisms.

basecalling_model.title: Basecalling Model
basecalling_model.description: Select the accuracy of the basecalleing model fast,hac or sup

gpus_in_use.title: Which GPU should be used ?
gpus_in_use.description: Use GPU acceleration for basecalling, (with cuda:0 -> graphics card 0 will be used. cuda:all -> uses all available gpus)
gpus_in_use.help_text: Enable GPU acceleration for faster basecalling. The GPU usage is mandatory for a time efficient workflow execution.

threads.help_text: Define the number of CPU cores to use

sample_type.title: Sample type
sample_type.help_text: provide information whether DNA or RNA is used

demand.title: Demand
demand.description: Demand high or low computational ressources
demand.help_text: Define high or low to select. For big datasets the runtime can be very high when using high. You will obtain a computed consensus sequence of clustered reads, when using high demand.

resources.run_time: ~10 hours per sample, highly dependent on dataset size
